description: Valid object with all required fields present and type-correct → valid:true
Missing required field 'name' → REQUIRED_MISSING error; path must be $.name (V85 fix)
Field 'age' declared integer in schema but data has string → TYPE_MISMATCH
Field 'tag' value 'toolong' (7 chars) exceeds maxLength:5 → MAX_LENGTH
Field 'code' value 'ab' (2 chars) is below minLength:3 → MIN_LENGTH
Field 'status' value 'pending' not in enum [active,inactive] → ENUM_MISMATCH
Missing required 'id' AND type mismatch on 'age' → 2 errors; paths $.id and $.age (V87 fix)
Empty object against minimal object schema with no constraints → valid:true
Field 'count' value 0 is below minimum:1 → MINIMUM error
Cold-start --describe must return parseable JSON with name and schema_version fields
RT-116 regression: property key with escaped quote — error path must emit valid JSON; path $.foo"bar (V84/V88 fix)
RT-117 regression: very negative value (-10B) with no minimum constraint → must be valid:true, not false MINIMUM error
RT-117 regression: very large value (10B) with no maximum constraint → must be valid:true, not false MAXIMUM error
RT-116b regression: 20-digit integer in data — overflow cap (>18 digits) caps to 9999999999 which exceeds maximum:100 → MAXIMUM error, no crash

RT-118 regression: required key 'foo\nbar' vs data key 'foo\tbar' — different escape sequences must NOT match (before fix: jsonStrEq returned true for both \n and \t since it skipped escaped char without comparing)

RT-118 bypass regression: required 'foo"bar' must NOT match data key 'foo"b' — the escaped-quote byte must not prematurely end the comparison (old bug: both strings hit '"' at same offset and old code returned true)
RT-120 regression: \u0041 is 6 raw bytes but 1 code point ('A') — maxLength:1 must pass (pre-fix: jsonStringLen counted 5, emitting false MAX_LENGTH)
RT-120 bypass regression: \u0041 is 1 code point — minLength:3 must fail (pre-fix: inflated count of 5 silently passed, allowing bypass of minimum-length constraints via Unicode escapes)
RT-120 regression: two \uXXXX escapes = 2 code points ('AB') — maxLength:2 must pass (pre-fix: counted as 10, false MAX_LENGTH)

RT-122 regression: integer-typed field with minimum — must emit MINIMUM not TYPE_MISMATCH (pre-fix: typeCompatible(integer=4, number=3) returned false, emitting spurious TYPE_MISMATCH and skipping range checks)
RT-121 bypass regression: 1e5 (scientific notation, logically 100000) must NOT match enum [1,2,3] — pre-fix: jsonParseInt stopped at 'e', returned 1, matching enum value 1 and bypassing validation
RT-121 regression baseline: exact integer 1 must still match enum [1] after raw-byte fix
additionalProperties:false — data key 'extra' not in schema properties → ADDITIONAL_PROPERTY error with path $.extra
additionalProperties:false — data has only declared properties → valid:true (no additional property errors)
const string match — data value exactly equals const value → valid:true
const string mismatch — data value 'v2' does not equal const 'v1' → CONST_MISMATCH error
nested properties depth-2: address.city is string → valid:true
nested properties depth-2: address.zip declared integer but data has string → TYPE_MISMATCH at path $.address.zip
nested depth-2: info.tag exceeds maxLength:3 → MAX_LENGTH at path $.info.tag
nested depth-2: stats.count value 0 is below minimum:1 → MINIMUM at path $.stats.count
Non-object root schema 'type':'string' → UNSUPPORTED_TYPE; path must be $ (root, no dot) — RT-213 fix
Cold-start --version must return parseable JSON with name and schema_version fields; version string omitted from expect_fields to avoid eval-case churn on patch releases
